metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for Raptortech development

plugins.name: ruby
plugins.description: Ruby development tools including rubocop linting

plugins.name: issues
plugins.description: Jira issues and GitLab merge requests

plugins.name: pair-programming
plugins.description: Get second opinions from AI providers (Grok, ChatGPT, Gemini) on implementation plans, code, or architecture decisions

plugins.name: aidlc
plugins.description: AI-DLC (AI-Driven Development Lifecycle) planning skills for Confluence initiatives and phased delivery plans

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: DEPRECATED: This plugin has been renamed to 'aidlc'. Please uninstall and install 'aidlc' instead.

plugins.name: context-init
plugins.description: Set up project context environments for non-developers with GitLab repos, Confluence, and Jira integration

plugins.name: jira-improve
plugins.description: Find and improve poorly written Jira issues using a quality rubric

plugins.name: behavioral-diff
plugins.description: Behavioural diff analysis to detect logic inversions, control flow changes, and semantic alterations that could break business logic. Catch bugs like inverted if-clauses before they reach production.

plugins.name: dotnet
plugins.description: .NET development tools including trunk-based migration for Raptor platform services

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security audit tools - vulnerability scanning, secrets detection, SAST analysis.
